allow: PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $\($cmd.Source\)"; ffmpeg -version | Select-Object -First 1 } else { Write-Output "ffmpeg not on PATH" }; Write-Output "--- checking common install locations ---"; $paths = @\("C:\\ffmpeg\\bin\\ffmpeg.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\ffmpeg.exe","C:\\Program Files\\ffmpeg\\bin\\ffmpeg.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "EXISTS: $p" } }; Write-Output "--- winget available? ---"; $wg = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($wg\) { Write-Output "winget: $\($wg.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "no winget" })

PowerShell($base = "C:\\Users\\Shagun\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\WinGet"; $ff = Get-ChildItem -Path $base -Recurse -Filter "ffmpeg.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($ff\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $\($ff.FullName\)"; & $ff.FullName -version | Select-Object -First 1 } else { Write-Output "not in temp \(cleaned\). Searching whole user profile..."; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Recurse -Filter "ffmpeg.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName })

PowerShell($d = Get-PSDrive C; $freeGB = [math]::Round\($d.Free/1GB,2\); $usedGB=[math]::Round\($d.Used/1GB,2\); Write-Output "C: free = ${freeGB} GB \(used ${usedGB} GB\)"; Write-Output "C: free MB = $\([math]::Round\($d.Free/1MB,0\)\) MB"; $ff="C:\\Users\\Shagun\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\WinGet\\Gyan.FFmpeg.8.1.1\\extracted\\ffmpeg-8.1.1-full_build\\bin\\ffmpeg.exe"; Write-Output "ffmpeg present: $\(Test-Path $ff\)")
Bash(rm -f src/pages/ResumeAnalyzer.jsx src/styles/ResumeAnalyzer.css src/components/PreLandingPage.jsx src/components/BoxLoader.jsx src/styles/PreLanding.css)
